Supports 10+ AI providers including Gemini, Claude, and GPT. Your data stays on your machine. Always.

title: Kai for Chrome: Local meeting transcription. No app. No account. | Product Hunt
og:title: Kai for Chrome: Local meeting transcription. No app. No account. | Product Hunt
og:description: Kai transcribes & summarizes your Meet, Zoom, and Teams calls 100% on-device. Press ⌘⇧K, get a clean summary + action items the moment the call ends. No account, no upload, no meeting bot in the room. First Chrome extension running Whisper Base fully locally via WebGPU + WASM. No cloud STT, no API call, no signup. Free forever. Built by Morgen as the entry point to Kai, our AI executive assistant.

title: Keen Code - A CLI Coding Agent: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents | Product Hunt
og:title: Keen Code - A CLI Coding Agent: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents | Product Hunt
og:description: Keen Code is an open-source, context-aware and efficient CLI coding agent written in Go. Three aspects stand it out from other similar products: - It was built from scratch by coding agents, with the full prompt/design trail preserved and shared in the repo. - It uses turn memory to keep multi-turn sessions lean which saves context significantly. - It maps MCP servers to lazy-loaded Skills instead of stuffing large schemas into context upfront. This again saves context in mult-MCP setting.

title: Knock: Customer engagement infrastructure for product-led growth | Product Hunt
og:title: Knock: Customer engagement infrastructure for product-led growth | Product Hunt
og:description:
Knock is a product and customer messaging infrastructure. You can use Knock to power all of your product's messaging needs, including transactional messaging, lifecycle marketing, one-time announcements, and in-product messaging, without the effort of building and maintaining your own in-house messaging system.

Knock is made with engineering, product, growth, and operations teams in mind. It's easy for developers to implement, and simple for less-technical users to maintain in our dashboard.

title: Kompassify: The onboarding compass for product-led growth | Product Hunt
og:title: Kompassify: The onboarding compass for product-led growth | Product Hunt
og:description: Whether you’re launching a new feature or guiding new users to their “aha” moment, Kompassify let you build and customize the user onboarding experiences in minutes instead of weeks.

title: Linkeezy: LinkedIn inbox and feeds without the chaos. | Product Hunt
og:title: Linkeezy: LinkedIn inbox and feeds without the chaos. | Product Hunt
og:description: Linkeezy helps anyone using LinkedIn daily or weekly manage conversations and content more efficiently. Organize your inbox, create feeds around people or topics, and save content so it’s easy to find later. Unlike automation tools, Linkeezy doesn’t send messages, generate AI replies, or take actions on your behalf. You stay in full control, and we don’t store your LinkedIn messages or content. Spend less time managing LinkedIn and more time building relationships and finding opportunities fast.

title: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine | Product Hunt
og:title: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine: LinkingMem — Graph-native RAG Engine | Product Hunt
og:description: LinkingMem is a Graph-native RAG engine combining Rust performance with Python AI plugins. It unifies vector search (HNSW), graph traversal (BFS), and LLM reasoning in a single pipeline for fast multi-hop retrieval. Key differentiators include tight graph+vector integration, embedding-based entity resolution, pluggable LLM/embedding backends, mmap-based low-latency storage, and production-ready scalability for large knowledge graphs.

title: Co-Invest: Trade 500+ markets directly from ChatGPT & Claude | Product Hunt
og:title: Co-Invest: Trade 500+ markets directly from ChatGPT & Claude | Product Hunt
og:description: Co-Invest by Liquid lets you research and place real trades inside ChatGPT or Claude. Access 500+ markets across crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and prediction markets—24/7. Fund in-chat, use on-chain signals (wallet activity, positioning, funding, order flow), and execute in plain language with stops/targets. Your AI also handles support with full context.

title: Mailwarm: The email warm-up tool. | Product Hunt
og:title: Mailwarm: The email warm-up tool. | Product Hunt
og:description: Mailwarm increases your email deliverability by raising your sender reputation. It warms up, increases the positive actions & keep your email activity flat. Emails are sent from your account to Mailwarm: they're put out of spam, opened, starred & replied.

title: MartinLoop: Control AI coding agents with limits, proof, + run receipts | Product Hunt
og:title: MartinLoop: Control AI coding agents with limits, proof, + run receipts | Product Hunt
og:description: MartinLoop is the control room for AI coding agents. The bigger build turns that into a full agent control plane: dashboards, HeadlessOS-style execution, team oversight, cost visibility, and a trusted record of what every agent did, why it kept going, and why it stopped.

og:title: Microsoft Terminal: Be What's Next. | Product Hunt

og:title: Mina - Meeting Assistant: Your AI Teammate now responds and executes during your calls | Product Hunt

og:title: Mirowl: Search all your screenshots via a local OCR-powered AI | Product Hunt

og:title: Overline: Real-time AI captions and translation for any browser video | Product Hunt

og:title: Paint By JSON: Real API data in your mockups made as easy as lorem ipsum. | Product Hunt

og:title: Paste: A better way to copy and paste on Mac, iPhone, and iPad | Product Hunt

og:title: PawPause: Lock your keyboard and prevent cats from causing chaos | Product Hunt

og:title: Perplexity Personal Computer for Windows: Run AI agents across your local files and apps on Windows | Product Hunt

og:title: PlugTalk: Your Mac talks back when you plug things in | Product Hunt

og:title: Presentify: Take your presentation skills to the next level | Product Hunt

og:title: R0Y: Figma for Investing | Product Hunt

og:title: RadianceKit: Turn photos into 3D Gaussian Splats on your Mac | Product Hunt
og:description: RadianceKit is the first native macOS app for 3D Gaussian Splatting. Simple Mode for one-click results, Scene-Class Presets (Render/Outdoor/Indoor), and full Expert control. Export to 6 formats, orbit videos, and web viewers. M1+, $7.99 one-time, 3-day trial.

title: Replicas: Run any coding agent harness in the cloud | Product Hunt
og:title: Replicas: Run any coding agent harness in the cloud | Product Hunt
og:description: Run background coding agents from anywhere. Spawn Claude Code or Codex in a VM with code and tooling ready to go. Hand off tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub Replicas runs Claude Code, Codex, or any coding agent in the cloud. Agents run in isolated VMs with real dev environments, and you can bring your own subscriptions and API keys. Trigger tasks from Slack, Linear, or GitHub and come back to a PR ready to review.

og:title: Sentinel: Control your robots from anywhere in the world | Product Hunt

og:title: Skylive: Never miss a celestial event, anywhere on Earth | Product Hunt
og:description: SkyLive is creating the world's first community-powered network of sky cameras. Our mission is to deploy cameras across the globe, enabling people to watch celestial events live regardless of weather, location, or time zone. By combining real-time streaming, global coverage, and event tracking, SkyLive makes astronomy more accessible than ever before.

title: Smart Runner: Your training plan, rewritten after every run | Product Hunt
og:title: Smart Runner: Your training plan, rewritten after every run | Product Hunt

Paces come from your VDOT, load tracking is the usual ATL/CTL/TSB, and workouts follow Pfitzinger, Daniels and Canova. Native Apple Watch app with live pace and HR zones. Two things make it different: it's a one-time purchase, not a subscription, and it runs entirely on-device. No account, no server, nothing leaves your phone. 14-day free trial.

title: SocialEcho 2.0: AI social media copilot for teams and agents | Product Hunt
og:title: SocialEcho 2.0: AI social media copilot for teams and agents | Product Hunt
og:description:
SocialEcho is an AI social media copilot for teams running sophisticated campaigns across multiple brands.

Discover what’s trending, generate original on-brand content, adapt every post to each platform’s style, publish from one workspace, manage audience interactions and track what actually drives engagement.

Built on official APIs, SocialEcho also gives AI agents like OpenClaw, Hermes a secure, reliable way to manage connected social accounts without brittle scraping or risky workarounds.

title: Sortail: Self-learning one-click inbox cleanup for Apple Mail | Product Hunt
og:title: Sortail: Self-learning one-click inbox cleanup for Apple Mail | Product Hunt
og:description: A tiny toolbar that floats above Apple Mail and sorts your inbox in one click — a single message, the whole thread, or every email from that sender, off to a folder, the archive, or the trash. It quietly learns where things usually go and starts suggesting the right folder for you.

og:title: Split Ninja: Cut, extract, mute, and split videos locally | Product Hunt
og:description: Split Ninja is a free local-first media toolkit for cutting videos, extracting audio, muting clips, and splitting scenes directly in your browser. Your files stay on your device, with fast export and precise re-encode modes.

title: StampCam: Turn any photo into a postage stamp or sticker | Product Hunt
og:title: StampCam: Turn any photo into a postage stamp or sticker | Product Hunt
og:description: StampCam is a stamp camera and sticker maker for iPhone. It lets you frame any photo as a postage stamp in many shapes, or cut out any subject and turn it into a sticker with one tap.

title: Sun: Collaborative voice API for agents | Product Hunt
og:title: Sun: Collaborative voice API for agents  | Product Hunt
og:description: Sun is a voice first AI model built specifically for real‑time collaborative voice interaction, not just one‑on‑one chat. ChatGPT Realtime and Gemini Live were built for one user talking to AI. Sun is built for collaboration — meetings, group calls, multi-agent debates, classrooms. One API, multi-speaker awareness, 10× the context window.

title: superlog: Make your product bug-free | Product Hunt
og:title: superlog: Make your product bug-free | Product Hunt
og:description: Superlog is an open-source autonomous observability tool. It installs itself and fixes the bugs it finds. With a single prompt, it instruments your repository with OpenTelemetry and keeps it up-to-date. When something breaks, it groups noisy issues into a single incident and posts one mergeable PR in Slack. Unlike Datadog or Sentry, there's no setup, no alert fatigue, and no manual fixing. Your telemetry stays vendor-neutral, so you keep full control of your data.

title: Tabstack: Extract web data and automate browsers, no scraper required. | Product Hunt
og:title: Tabstack: Extract web data and automate browsers, no scraper required. | Product Hunt
og:description: Tabstack is a web data and automation API that delivers reliable structured output. Pass a URL and a schema, get back JSON that matches every time. Run research in one call and get cited answers back. Automate browsers without running infrastructure. The intelligence is built into every API call. No scraper to build, maintain, or watch break when a site changes. Built at Mozilla.

title: TaskGPT: Tell your Mac what to do. | Product Hunt
og:title: TaskGPT: Tell your Mac what to do. | Product Hunt
og:description: Tell your Mac what to do and watch it perform the task. The most powerful and secure AI for MacOS

title: Teamside: Teamside small team chat and voice rooms (European servers) | Product Hunt
og:title: Teamside: Teamside small team chat and voice rooms (European servers) | Product Hunt
og:description: Teamside is an installable web app for private teams, gaming groups, and small communities that need fast text chat, voice rooms, secure invites, and real-time presence without the weight of a traditional desktop client. It starts with lightweight WebRTC peer-to-peer voice for small rooms, then can migrate to SFU server mode when more reliability is needed. Built as a PWA, Teamside feels close to a native PC app while staying easy to open, share, and update We are on European servers exclusively

title: Tokenwise: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying | Product Hunt
og:title: Tokenwise: A smart LLM proxy that shows where you're overpaying | Product Hunt
og:description: Tokenwise is a one-line LLM proxy (OpenAI-compatible baseURL) for makers and small teams. It learns from your real requests, shows exactly where you're overpaying, proven with quality checks on your own traffic, not public benchmark, and lets you apply the fix in one click while it verifies the savings in real dollars.

title: Town: The assistant that learns how you work, then gets to work. | Product Hunt
og:title: Town: The assistant that learns how you work, then gets to work.  | Product Hunt
og:description: Town is the unusually helpful AI assistant. It learns how you work, not the other way around: your voice, your people, your patterns. It works where you do, across email, calendar, docs, and messages. It drafts your replies, handles your scheduling, and builds routines for the work you repeat. The more it learns, the more it does on its own, so your time goes to the work only you can do.o big ideas.

title: Trippple Club: Advertise together on Meta Ads and pay 3x less | Product Hunt
og:title: Trippple Club: Advertise together on Meta Ads and pay 3x less | Product Hunt
og:description: Trippple Club is the first Meta ads collective for small businesses. You pool your budget with non-competing peers who share your audience. The algorithm treats the group like one large advertiser. Everyone gets better delivery, faster learning, and lower costs - and it compounds as the collective grows, besides, we create your ads too!

title: Trovelo - Private Trip Planner: Plan trips privately. No accounts, no subscription, ever. | Product Hunt
og:title: Trovelo - Private Trip Planner: Plan trips privately. No accounts, no subscription, ever. | Product Hunt

Trovelo is a private trip planner for iPhone and Mac, built by a solo traveler with 40+ countries and 300+ cities of experience who got tired of juggling Google Maps, Notes, and spreadsheets.

Day-by-day itinerary planning with smart activity cards
Dual currency budget tracking with live exchange rates
Route optimization to plan your day efficiently
Curated travel guides by real travelers
Lock screen widgets & iCloud sync
No accounts. No Trovelo servers. Your data stays private.

title: TwelveLabs: AI platform for deep video understanding | Product Hunt
og:title: TwelveLabs: AI platform for deep video understanding | Product Hunt

title: Uselink: host your html, share the link, and get comments | Product Hunt
og:title: Uselink: host your html, share the link, and get comments | Product Hunt
og:description: uselink turns any HTML or Markdown into a clean link you control. paste a doc, get a url under your handle, decide who can read and who can comment. readers reply in threads with no account, which Google Docs and Notion can't do. interactive HTML actually runs. add a password, an expiry, or a view limit, and keep every version. new this launch: a visual editor to edit live pages with no code, and an MCP server so Claude, Cursor, or n8n can publish for you.

title: Vokal: A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents | Product Hunt
og:title: Vokal: A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents | Product Hunt
og:description: Your Codex and my Codex can’t talk, so we play human telephone in Slack: copy prompts, paste summaries, ask for reviews, and lose the run. Vokal brings 10x teammates and their agents into one live workspace in minutes, whether they run local Codex, Claude Code, or Hermes — or in the cloud. Name your agents, give them roles, access, and memory, and work will happen in a shared collaboration space instead of through copy-paste handoffs.

title: Walkable: Safety-first walking navigation to walk the safest routes | Product Hunt

title: Хакеры атакуют RCE-уязвимость в Windows Netlogon — Хакер
og:title: Хакеры атакуют RCE-уязвимость в Windows Netlogon
og:description: Бельгийский центр кибербезопасности сообщил, что злоумышленники начали эксплуатировать критическую уязвимость CVE-2026-41089 в службе Netlogon. Проблема позволяет удаленно выполнить код на сервере без аутентификации и получила 9,8 балла по шкале CVSS. Однако в Microsoft заявляют, что пока не видят подтверждений этим атакам.
